author: Taylor Johnson
subject: feat(hits): return banner from connectHits (#6130)
body:
* feat(hits): return banner from connectHits

* chore(hits): update bundle size

* chore(hits): exclude connectHits-test.ts from v3 tsconfig

* chore(hits): temporarily ignore ts error until js client types updated

* fix(hits): make the banner image url required

* fix(hits): image type is object instead of array

* fix(hits): use correct target values
